question: Are the sunflowers positioned inside the glass vase on the coffee table?
Has the brown kraft wrapping paper and twine been completely removed from the sunflower bouquet?
Are the sunflowers arranged loosely as individual stems rather than retaining the tight, wrapped bouquet shape?
Is an orange tabby cat present on the sectional sofa?
Is the cat positioned in the right corner/section of the sofa (from the viewer's perspective)?
Is the cat depicted in a lying down or curled-up position consistent with the reference image?
Is the cream-colored blanket from the cat's source image completely removed, leaving only the cat?
Are the sunflower stems visible through the transparent glass vase with appropriate refraction?
Is the lighting on the cat consistent with the directional light coming from the windows on the left?
Is the lighting on the sunflowers consistent with the afternoon side light in the room?
Does the cat cast a realistic soft shadow onto the sofa cushions?
Does the vase with sunflowers cast an appropriate shadow on the marble coffee table?
Does the cat appear to be naturally resting on the sofa fabric (showing weight/contact) rather than floating?
Is the scale of the cat proportionate to the size of the sectional sofa?
Is the scale of the sunflower arrangement appropriate relative to the vase and coffee table?
Are the edges of the cat and sunflowers seamlessly blended without visible halos or jagged cut-out lines?
Is the blue abstract painting on the wall preserved exactly as it was in the base image?
Is the black tripod floor lamp on the right side of the room preserved?
Are the magazines on the coffee table preserved without distortion?
Is the light hardwood flooring and window area preserved without unintended alterations?
Is the cat's anatomy correct, with no missing limbs, extra tails, or distorted features?
Are the sunflowers structurally correct with intact centers and properly arranged petals?
Is the image free from unintended artifacts such as noise, blurriness, or glitching in the edited regions?
